intent: Five logical groups, conditional sections, and repeating rows on a multi-screen mask.
notes: Application + Items baseline: nodePath segments encode five logical groups (personal, contact, identity, line-items, totals); the Passport field is conditional on a non-EU Country; the Items screen models a repeating row with three repeating fields plus a derived Grand Total. Used to exercise group-aware coverage and repeating-row test-case enumeration.
